enriched.name: Dream Glass
enriched.note: Original 2018 dev kit specs confirmed: 1280x880 res, 60Hz, 240g weight, PC-powered with USB/HDMI tether.

enriched.name: Dream Glass 4K

enriched.name: Dream Glass 4K Plus
enriched.note: 2020 standalone, same as 4K but with 4GB RAM (vs 2GB). Uses birdbath optics, 1920x1080 per eye.

enriched.name: Dream Glass Flow
enriched.note: 2022 standalone Micro-OLED model. 43-degree diagonal FOV confirmed; binocular resolution 3840x1080 (combined). Weight 59g is accurate.

enriched.name: Dream Glass Lead Plus
enriched.note: 2022 standalone with Snapdragon 670, 1920x1080 per eye, 3GB RAM. 200-inch display equivalent. 320g weight confirmed.

enriched.name: Dream Glass Lead Pro
enriched.note: 2022 standalone with Snapdragon 670, 1920x1080 per eye, 4GB RAM (vs 3GB Plus). Adds 6DOF tracking, Unity SDK, enterprise features. 330g weight confirmed.

newDevices.lifecycle_notes: Announced Juli 2025, begrenzte Versand ab Dezember 2025. Flagship XR-Brille mit 58° FOV.

newDevices.name: Vuzix LX1
newDevices.lifecycle_notes: Purpose-built für Warehouse-Operationen; Sampling seit Sommer 2025, Produktion Ende 2025.

newDevices.name: Xreal Eye
newDevices.lifecycle_notes: Camera-Zubehör für Xreal One Series. Ermöglicht 6DoF Tracking, Fotos und Mixed Reality Video.

newDevices.name: Xreal 1S
newDevices.lifecycle_notes: Launched CES 2026. 1200p upgrade zu One mit höherem Kontrast und 52° FOV.

newDevices.name: Xreal Project Aura
newDevices.lifecycle_notes: Android XR-Brille. Angekündigt Google I/O 2025, Marktstart vor Ende 2026 geplant. Angekuendigt, Marktstart ausstehend.
